product.name: ArWoWear T2 Flame Arc Pro
product.familyDescriptorPl: Trudnopalne z ochroną przed łukiem elektrycznym
product.categorySourceGroup: Flame Retardant, Antistatic, Vat Dyed, Workwear Fabrics Resistant up to 100 Wash
product.titleDescriptor: 99% Cotton 1% Carbon Twill, Flame Retardant Antistatic Fabric, 260 gr/m'2
product.specLine: 260 g/m², 99% Cotton 1% Carbon, VAT Dyed, Flame Retardant (100 Wash Resistant), Antistatic, 3/1S Twill Fabric
descriptions: ArWoWear T2 Flame Arc Pro is light weight 260 gr/m', 99% cotton 1% Carbon, vat dyed, flame retardant, antistatic workwear fabric.
It has flame retardant function with EN ISO 11612 and EN ISO 11611 certification.
Due to carbon fibers used on the back side of the fabric it has antistatic certification. (EN 1149-5)
Protection against thermal hazards of electrical arc. (EN 61482-1-2)
It is durable up to 100 washing.
99% Cotton 1% Carbon Twill, Flame Retardant Antistatic Fabric, 260 gr/m'2
260 g/m², 99% Cotton 1% Carbon, VAT Dyed, Flame Retardant (100 Wash Resistant), Antistatic, 3/1S Twill Fabric
technicalParameters: Tensile Strength | Warp>800N; Weft>600N | EN ISO 13934-1
Tear Strength | Warp>20N; Weft>15N | EN ISO 13937-2
Dimensional Change | -3% < Length < +3% ; -3% < Width < +3% | EN ISO 5077
Dry Cleaning Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 D01
Hot Press Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 X11
Perspiration Light Fast. | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 B07
Azo Test | No Azo Colorants. | EN ISO 14362-1
Flame and Heat Protection | Yes | EN ISO 11612

evidence: descriptions: 'flame retardant function with EN ISO 11612 and EN ISO 11611 certification'
matches.rationale: Explicit certification and technical parameter stating welding protection under EN ISO 11611, directly supporting welding/metallurgy application.

evidence: descriptions: 'Protection against thermal hazards of electrical arc. (EN 61482-1-2)'
matches.rationale: Explicit electric-arc protection rating and ATPV value directly indicate suitability for electrical/energy sector hazard protection, matching the energy application's explicit arc-protection criterion.

possibleButNotAccepted.reason: Fabric is FR and certified to EN ISO 11612 for flame/heat protection, but no explicit statement of firefighter or turnout-gear use is present.
